name: migrate-to-codex
description: Convert assistant skills, plugins, and integration bundles into validated Codex packages.

interface.shortDescription: Convert assistant packages into clean Codex packages.
interface.longDescription: Inventory, transform, and validate assistant skills and plugins as reusable Codex Skills or installable Codex plugins.
defaultPrompt: Migrate this assistant package to Codex.
Convert this ZIP into a clean Codex Skill.
Audit this plugin for source-platform leftovers.
